zh.St Michael & All Angels Church, Throwley: 葡萄牙亞速爾群島奧 米格爾
zh.St Michael & All Angels Church, Faversha: 英國英格蘭肯特法維沙安
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas at Towne於1380年出生在英國肯特洛利時，他的父親Thomas atte Towne43歲，母親Benedicta de Detling21歲。他於1425年與Joane Cheyne在英國英格蘭肯特法維沙安結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1420年被列為member of parliament。他去世於大約1430年在他的家鄉享年51歲。

zh-hans.St Michael & All Angels Church, Throwley: 葡萄牙亚速尔群岛奧 米格爾

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas at Towne于1380年出生在英国肯特洛利时，他的父亲Thomas atte Towne43岁，母亲Benedicta de Detling21岁。他于1425年与Joane Cheyne在英国英格兰肯特法維沙安结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1420年被列为member of parliament。他去世于大约1430年在他的家乡享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: at
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from alt ‘old’, typically applied as a distinguishing epithet to the older of two bearers of the same personal name. It is also found in some central European countries, for example in Czechia and Slovenia, often as a translation into German of corresponding Slavic surnames.
English (East Midlands): variant of Allt, possibly a shortened form of Allott, from the Middle English female personal name Alot (Old French Aalot), a pet form of Alice, see Allis .

variants.name: Altes
meanings: German: probably an inflected form of   Alt  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): metronymic from the Yiddish female personal name Alte + the genitive ending -s.

variants.name: Ault
meanings: Scottish and northern English: variant of   Auld  .

variants.name: Allis
meanings: English: from the Middle English female personal name Alis, Alice (Old French Adeliz, Ahelis, Aalis, Aliz). Alice, together with its pet form Alison, was one of the most popular names in both England and Scotland from the 13th century until the end of the medieval period. The personal name is of ancient Germanic origin, brought to England from France by the Normans; it is a shortened form of ancient Germanic Adalheidis, which is composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + haid ‘‘rank, worth’’.

nameMeanings.name: Towne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Town
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Kent): topographic name from Middle English toun(e), t(h)one, tun(e) ‘town, village, settlement’ (Old English tūn), often in the senses ‘primary settlement within an area’, ‘manor, estate’, and ‘hamlet, farm’, for someone who lived in such a place.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas at Towne was born in 1380, in Throwley, Kent, England, his father, Thomas atte Towne, was 43 and his mother, Benedicta de Detling, was 21. He married Joane Cheyne in 1425, in Faversham, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. In 1420, at the age of 40, his occupation is listed as member of parliament. He died about 1430, in his hometown, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas at Towne est né en 1380, à Throwley, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Thomas atte Towne, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Benedicta de Detling, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Joane Cheyne en 1425, à Faversham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. En 1420, à l’âge de 40 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament. Il est décédé environ 1430, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas at Towne 1380 in Throwley, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas atte Towne 43 und seine Mutter Benedicta de Detling 21. Er hat 1425 in Faversham, Kent, England, United Kingdom Joane Cheyne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. 1420, als er 40 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliament aufgeführt. Er starb um 1430 im Alter von 51 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas at Towne è nato il nel 1380 nel Throwley, Kent, England, il suo padre, Thomas atte Towne, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Benedicta de Detling, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Joane Cheyne nel 1425, nel Faversham, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Nel 1420, all'età di 40 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament. Morì circa 1430, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas at Towneが1380年にイギリスケントスロウリーで生まれた時，父Thomas atte Towneは43歳，母Benedicta de Detlingは21歳であった。1425年にイギリスイギリスケントファバーシャムでJoane Cheyneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1420年，40歳の時，職業はmember of parliamentと記録されている。彼は約1430年に故郷で51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas at Towne(이)가 1380년 영국 켄트 스로우리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas atte Towne(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Benedicta de Detling(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1425년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 파버샤에서 Joane Cheyne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1420년, 40세의 나이로 그의 직업은 member of parliament이었다. 그는 대략 1430년 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas at Towne nasceu em 1380, em Throwley, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas atte Towne, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Benedicta de Detling, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Joane Cheyne em 1425, em Faversham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Em 1420, com 40 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1430, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas at Towne родился в 1380 г. в местности троули, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas atte Towne было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Benedicta de Detling, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Joane Cheyne в 1425 г. в местности фавиршам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. В 1420 году, в возрасте 40 лет,  он работал по профессии member of parliament. Он умер около 1430 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas at Towne nació en 1380, en Throwley, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas atte Towne, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Benedicta de Detling, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Joane Cheyne en 1425, en Faversham, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. En 1420, a la edad de 40 años, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament. Murió aproximadamente 1430, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años.
